message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent for nira, and this conversation is being logged. I also see a request to stop contact on this account, so I will not continue outreach. Since your identity is already verified, I’ve noted that you may be open to reasonable closure terms and will route this to the next agent to review available options without repeating verification.

Next priority: review permitted options and provide exact approved terms if policy allows, while honoring the stop-contact boundary."}

Understood, but unless you can provide a specific settlement amount and payment deadline, there’s nothing for me to agree to.

I checked the available lender data. I can confirm the current policy boundary is that no extension can go beyond 30 days, but I cannot confirm an exact approved settlement amount or exact approved payment-plan terms from the available data in this turn. Based on what you already stated, if you want a payment-plan request kept active, the remaining balance would need to be completed within that 30-day window. If you only want to proceed with a specific approved settlement figure and deadline, I’ve recorded that exact position and will not continue back-and-forth on this stage.

{"from_stage": "RESOLUTION", "to_stage": "FINAL_NOTICE", "summary": "Conversation already in progress; AI identity disclosure and recording/logging disclosure were already completed, and identity verification was already established earlier.
